_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremA_exact_equivalence_full_model.py (A1b). Mirrors the A1bConfig dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §8.1. A1b adds the TRUE full-hidden-state aligned structured forward pass (R0) — A1's R1 was an iterative form of the reduced recursion and did not exercise the full model. R0 builds the (P+K)×(P+K) bilinear score from (X, Γ) and applies L explicit residual-stream layer updates with a GD-compatible signed mask, without consuming the GA-generator's (A_S, B_S, T) as inputs.
